summary: Fix Google Calendar sync for web session accounts.

fixed: Calendar Sync now pulls events for web sign-in accounts — Upcoming no longer stays empty when the calendar grid shows Home, Office, or Out of Office blocks
Embedded calendar fetches the private iCal feed using your active browser session instead of relying on copied cookies alone
All-day and working-location events are parsed correctly, including labels like "Home, Monday, June 16"
Date parsing no longer assigns year 2000 to month/day labels, which previously filtered every event as past
changed: Sync Calendar waits slightly longer for the embedded web view to report events before merging results
